title: Research-aligned compaction ladder must stay above densify floors
prompt: Verify DEFAULT_COMPACTION_CONFIG stays research-aligned (soft 0.80, hard 0.92, async 0.70) and UI ladder imports the same SDK defaults.

fixtureActions.content:
# Research-Aligned Compaction Ladder

## Soft trigger
DEFAULT_COMPACTION_TRIGGER_RATIO = 0.80

## Hard block
DEFAULT_COMPACTION_BLOCK_RATIO = 0.92

## Async pre-rot
DEFAULT_ASYNC_COMPACTION_TRIGGER_RATIO = 0.70

## Budgets
reservedContextSize = 50000 · absoluteTriggerTokens = 200000 · maxRecentMessages = 4

## Safety floor
assertCompactionLadderSafety rejects densify soft 0.01001 and async≈soft collisions

## UI coupling
TUI context-ladder imports the same SDK defaults (async70 / soft80 / danger90)
